ddls:
CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "original_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes before optimization */,
  "gzipped_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes after gzip compression */,
  "compression_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the original size after optimization */,
  "gzipped_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the original size after gzip compression */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file on the server */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., JavaScript, CSS) */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* File extension (e.g., .js, .css) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was first uploaded */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimization_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the optimization method (e.g., Closure Advanced, JSMin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the optimization method */,
  "method_version" TEXT /* Version of the optimization method */,
  "method_url" TEXT /* URL or documentation link for the method */,
  "method_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters or settings used for the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_optimizations" (
  "optimization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file being optimized */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization method used */,
  "optimized_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes after optimization */,
  "compression_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the original size after optimization */,
  "optimization_date" TEXT /* Date when the optimization was performed */,
  "optimization_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the optimization process in seconds */,
  "optimization_log" TEXT /* Logs or notes about the optimization process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("optimization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_optimizations_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES optimization_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_optimizations_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the file */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the file */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file version */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the file */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in this version */,
  "version_md5" TEXT /* MD5 hash of the file version for integrity checks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_versions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file upload event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  "upload_description" TEXT /* Description of the upload (e.g., purpose, notes) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the uploaded file on the server */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file at the time of upload */,
  "upload_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_uploads_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file download event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who downloaded the file */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was downloaded */,
  "download_reason" TEXT /* Reason for downloading the file (e.g., testing, production) */,
  "download_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the file was downloaded */,
  "download_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file at the time of download */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_downloads_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the comment was made */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_comments_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)
